infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Katchimeras uses the camera in the dev avatar lab so you can capture a selfie and generate a stylized avatar.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Katchimeras uses your location while the app is open so it can remember where your day happened and build gentle day maps.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Katchimeras can read your workout routes from Apple Health when you choose to import a walk into a memory map.

plugins.cameraPermission: Katchimeras uses the camera in the dev avatar lab so you can capture a selfie and generate a stylized avatar.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Katchimeras uses your location while the app is open so it can remember where your day happened and build gentle day maps.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Katchimeras uses your location while the app is open so it can remember where your day happened and build gentle day maps.

plugins.photosPermission: Katchimeras uses your photos so you can turn moments into memories and attach place when a photo already knows where it was taken.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Katchimeras can save generated images to your photo library when you choose to keep them.
